articles.author: Sean Conlon, Pia Singh
articles.title: S&P 500 falls as Nvidia rolls over following earnings: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: The moves follow an upbeat day for U.S. equities. The S&P 500 notched a second straight day of gains, lifted by a comeback in major tech companies.
articles.content:
The S&P 500 pulled back on Thursday as the latest results from tech titan Nvidia and software giant Salesforce weren't enough to boost the broader market.

articles.title: New AirSnitch attack breaks Wi-Fi encryption in homes, offices, and enterprises - Ars Technica
articles.description: That guest network you set up for your neighbors may not be as secure as you think.
